description: Immerse yourself in a nostalgic journey back to the 70's with our captivating email subscription. Our confirmation email will ensure a smooth single opt-in process, streamlining your journey into our vibrant world of retro vibes. We prioritize your convenience, hence we've introduced a simplified confirmation process for your account. With a single click, you can dive into a realm of carefully curated content, designed to keep you entertained and informed. Our welcome mail is your gateway to a unique subscription experience, carefully wrapped in an optical theme that echoes the charm of the 70's. Join us and celebrate the magic of this golden era. Welcome to a world where the past meets the present, right in your inbox.
short_description: Join our 70's inspired email subscription. Simplified single opt-in confirmation process, ensuring a seamless transition into our world of retro vibes. Enjoy curated content in our welcome mail, wrapped in a unique optical theme. Experience the past meeting the present right in your inbox.

designer.description: I design, create layouts, videos and animations. I have been working in the world of communication since 2012. I believe that feeding on cinema, music, and art is an essential source of enrichment to always give new forms to creativity.
